pinyin: Zhè bù shì wǒ de shǒujī.

english: All these apples are very fresh.

pinyin: Tā qùnián qù Rìběn lǚyóu le.
english: She traveled to Japan last year.

sent_simp: 图书馆里不能大声说话。
sent_trad: 圖書館裡不能大聲說話。
pinyin: Túshūguǎn lǐ bù néng dàshēng shuōhuà.
english: You can't talk loudly in the library.

sent_simp: 我不会开车，只会骑自行车。
sent_trad: 我不會開車，只會騎自行車。
pinyin: Wǒ bù huì kāichē, zhǐ huì qí zìxíngchē.
english: I can't drive; I can only ride a bicycle.

pinyin: Nǐ zhēn de yào bānjiā le ma?

english: The government should serve the people.
The night view of Hong Kong is stunning.
